title: HTTP Caching, Freshness, Validators, Vary, and Invalidation · Browser and Node Client Sys… · Compiler Case: Validators Conditional Requests
summary: An offline-first dashboard combines browser HTTP caching, a service-worker cache, ETags, Vary, and user-specific responses. Planned artifact: Add and verify the http ts validators conditional requests increment in a TypeScript 7 standards-based Fetch spec-aware cache decision notebook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use ETag and Last-Modified validators with If-None-Match or If-Modified-Since and interpret 304 correctly. Demonstrate the result through TypeScript 7 strict types plus WHATWG Fetch Request, Response, Headers, URL, streams, and AbortSignal contracts.

Compute freshness from explicit directives, dates, age, and response context rather than wall-clock intuition. Demonstrate the result through TypeScript 7 strict types plus WHATWG Fetch Request, Response, Headers, URL, streams, and AbortSignal contracts.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
